name: OTPFieldRoot
description:
Groups all OTP field parts and manages their state.
Renders a `<div>` element.

name.description: Identifies the field when a form is submitted.

defaultValue.description: The uncontrolled OTP value when the component is initially rendered.

onValueChange.description:
Callback fired when the OTP value changes.

The `eventDetails.reason` indicates what triggered the change:
- `'input-change'` for typing or autofill
- `'input-clear'` when a digit is removed by text input
- `'input-paste'` for paste interactions
- `'keyboard'` for keyboard navigation that changes the value
onValueChange.detailedType:
| ((
    value: string,
    eventDetails: OTPField.Root.ChangeEventDetails,
  ) => void)
| undefined

autoComplete.description: The input autocomplete attribute. Applied to the first slot and hidden validation input.

autoSubmit.description: Whether to submit the owning form when the OTP becomes complete.

length.description: The number of OTP input slots.

onValueComplete.description:
Callback function that is fired when the OTP value becomes complete.

It runs later than `onValueChange`, after the internal value update is applied.

If `autoSubmit` is enabled, it runs immediately before the owning form is submitted.

**Warning**: This is a generic event not a change event.
onValueComplete.detailedType:
| ((
    value: string,
    eventDetails: OTPField.Root.CompleteEventDetails,
  ) => void)
| undefined

disabled.description: Whether the component should ignore user interaction.

readOnly.description: Whether the user should be unable to change the field value.

required.description: Whether the user must enter a value before submitting a form.

id.description: The id of the first input element.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

style.detailedType:
| React.CSSProperties
| ((
    state: OTPField.Root.State,
  ) => CSSProperties | undefined)
| undefined

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: OTPField.Root.State,
  ) => ReactElement)

data-disabled.description: Present when the OTP field is disabled.

data-readonly.description: Present when the OTP field is readonly.

data-required.description: Present when the OTP field is required.

data-valid.description: Present when the OTP field is in valid state (when wrapped in Field.Root).

data-invalid.description: Present when the OTP field is in invalid state (when wrapped in Field.Root).

data-dirty.description: Present when the OTP field's value has changed (when wrapped in Field.Root).

data-touched.description: Present when the OTP field has been touched (when wrapped in Field.Root).

data-complete.description: Present when all slots are filled.

data-filled.description: Present when the OTP field contains at least one digit.

data-focused.description: Present when one of the OTP field inputs is focused.
